targets.source: owner-approved concept image or MLGS-generated target
nonNegotiables: Replace with concrete composition, palette, material, UI, and detail rules

styleLock.renderingMedium: Replace with the approved medium and rendering language.
styleLock.contrast: Replace with approved value and contrast structure.
lighting: Replace with approved lighting direction and source.
surfaceTexture: Replace with approved texture and wear language.
shapeLanguage: Replace with approved silhouette and proportion language.
preserve: Replace with invariants that must be repeated on every generation or edit.
avoid: Replace with forbidden visual drift, including unwanted hue or style shifts.
